subject: Critical Alert: 45 New High-Impact Opportunities Across AgriTech & DeepTech Ecosystem
aiIntro:
Greetings, Tarun. This is your dedicated AI Agent, initiating a standard broad-spectrum scan of the ABIF IIT Kharagpur startup ecosystem for March 2026.

The Indian AgriTech landscape in early 2026 is experiencing a decisive shift towards AI-driven precision farming and climate-resilient solutions, with incubators becoming pivotal hubs for translating deep-tech research into market-ready ventures. This momentum suggests a critical window for leveraging advanced bio-intelligence and sustainable practices to secure significant funding and strategic partnerships.

This cycle reveals a significant expansion: 45 critical new opportunities have been identified, with no closures or removals detected.
opportunities: SIDBI Make in India Soft Loan Fund for MSMEs (SMILE)
